title: [ZH] 菜鸟 —— 轻资产物流协调平台

description.en: BMC of Cainiao's current operating model: a coordination platform on top of third-party couriers, with selective owned infrastructure (EWTP e-hubs, smart warehouses, Cainiao Stations).
description.zh: 菜鸟现行运营模式的画布:底层是第三方快递,菜鸟在上面做协调平台,只在关键节点自建(EWTP e-hub、智能仓、菜鸟驿站)。
